step_rationale: Membrane-repair protein dysregulated in cardiac ischemia; associates with myocardial necrosis.
mechanism: Dysferlin dysfunction impairs cardiomyocyte membrane integrity during ischemic injury, exacerbating myocardial damage.

references.title: Abnormal fatty acid metabolism and ceramide expression may discriminate myocardial infarction from strangulation death: A pilot study.
